title: Desk Fortune Cookie
description: A time-of-day fortune cookie that changes 6x through the workday (commute, morning, lunch, afternoon, leaving, home), with a job-based comment and a day-of-week bonus line. One crack per time slot per day, with a shareable result link. In-game content is entirely in Korean (a deliberate one-off exception, like Cat Care and Tarot Pick).

title: Tarot Pick
description: Pull one card from a full 78-card deck across 10 workplace-life categories (job changes, salary, your boss, and more). In-game content is entirely in Korean (a deliberate one-off exception, like Cat Care).

title: Lucky Numbers
description: A for-fun random number generator (5 numbers, 1-99, plus a bonus lucky item) — not a 6/45 lotto format, makes no odds-related claims, and is not affiliated with any official lottery operator. In-game content is entirely in Korean (a deliberate one-off exception, like Cat Care).
